brief_summary: Four-row pairing map showing plate combinations the article endorses (three) and one to avoid (POM + gasket-mount, marked with a bordeaux X). Each row reads: [plate name + modulus] + [mount/foam] + [switch type] → [verdict in bordeaux]. Rows: brass + foam + PE sheet → 'controlled brass'; FR4 + clack-forward switch + Cherry profile → 'let the switch sing'; PC + gasket-mount + thock switch → 'deep thock'; POM + gasket-mount → 'be careful — dead board'.
data_sources: plate-materials-explained.mdx § 'Pairing notes that hold up in practice' — 'Brass plate plus heavy case foam plus PE-foam switch sheet is the classic controlled brass build ... FR4 plate plus a clack-forward switch ... is the let the switch sing build ... Polycarbonate plate plus gasket-mount plus a thock-forward switch ... is the deep thock default ... POM plate plus gasket-mount is the combination to be careful with.'
